headline: What's Happening With CoreWeave Stock?
summary: The primary signal within CoreWeave’s (CRWV) Q1 2026 results is the transition of the company from a high-growth AI darling into a massive, capital-intensive infrastructure utility. headline: Competition between the U.S. and China is inevitable: Gavekal Technologies
summary: Laila Khawaja, director of Gavekal Technologies, says even though there is a risk that the U.S.-China tensions will escalate further, the risk will ultimately be contained as the two countries will remain mutually dependent for the foreseeable future. She also says that while tech export controls are likely to be discussed at the upcoming Trump-Xi summit, it's unlikely they will be rolled-back as Trump lacks the political incentives to do so.
